title: Verify 'trial-corner-topcontent-played' event
description: Test that the content played event is fired from the Engagement section.
preconditions: User is on the Trial Corner hub

steps.description: 2. Click play on the displayed content.

expected_result: The 'trial-corner-topcontent-played' event is fired with the correct 'content id' and 'play' type (self play/autoplay).
